creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Yuri Victorovich from comment #3)
> (In reply to Dimitry Andric from comment #1)
> 
> 11.2-STABLE has this header, but no libc++experimental.a:

Yes, I noticed that while preparing the clang 7.0 merge, so it is going to be fixed real soon now.  Either it was an oversight, or I was convinced that nobody would be interested in having experimental features on a stable branch... :)
